info.english_meaning: to fearto tremble to shiver to be distressed to move
info.hindI_arTa: qaranA qara se kampita honA kAMpanA Apadagrasta honA calanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' vevektIti pfTagBAve vivekte ca Baye punaH  vinakti vijate ...' (Slo. 61 - 62) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'upAviSan garutmantaH SarErgAQaM pravejitAH' (BA॰vi॰32.17) pravejitAH=udvegaM prApitAH utpUrvasya vijeH prayogastu bahulatamaH sampUrvasya kvAcitkaH prapUrvasya viralatamaH
'aBiprehi mA'pavikTAH' (aTarva॰pi॰1.47.2) apavikTA ityatreqaBAvaSCAndasaH loke prAyeRa vijirutpUrvo dfzwaH kvacideva kevalaH sampUrvaSca
'yApa sarpaM vijamAnA vimfgvarI (pfTivI)' (aTarva॰12.1.37) a pavijamAnA udvejayamAnetyarTaH
'udvepaya saM vijantAm' (aTarva0 119 12) svasTAnAd vicalitA BavantvityAha
'yaTA SyenAt patattriRaH saMvijante' (aTarva 0 5216) saMvijante=udvijante=trasyanti
'mA BermA saMvikTAH' (vA0 saM0 635) mA saMvikTAH=mA saMvijizWAH=mA vicAlIH
'yaTA mfgAH saMvijanta AraRyA puruzAdaDi' (aTarva 0 5214) saMvijante=apaDAvanti AtmaparIpsayA tvarante
'SrutvA jarAM saMvivije mahAtmA' (budDa0 334) saMvivije=vivyaTe=vicacAla=vyAkulo baBUva
'visfjya saSaraM cApaM SokasaMvignamAnasaH' (gItA 147) SokavyAkulitacetAH
'kirmIravaDasaMvigno bahirduryoDano yayO' (BA0 vana0 1039) ukto'rTaH
'hfnmarmeBedipatadutkawakaNkapatrasaMvegatatkzaRakftasPuwadaNgaBaNgA' (tAwakA) (mahAvIra0 139) saMvegaH=vegaH
'pUrarecakasaMvignavalivalgudalodaram' (rUpam) (BA0 pu0 42450)  saMvignA itastataScalitA valayaH prAyeRa saMvijistrAsakftamapasaraRamAha na tu cezwAmAtram
'sakfd vivignAnapi hi prayuktaM mADuryamIzwe hariRAn grahItum' (raGu0 1813) vivignaH saMvigna udvignaH santrastaH
'sa rAmalakzmaRO…SarEH…BfSamAvejayAmAsa' (rA0 6208) AvejayAmAsa saMramBaM gamayAmAsa kzoBayAmAsa
'Avigne hfdi santApaM janayatyaSivaM mama' (BA0 Adi0 23316) AvignaM calitaM kzuBitam
'apAM vegAsaH pfTagud vijantAm' (aTarva0 4153) udvijantAmuccalantu iha vijiH SArIre calane kampane vartate loke tu mAnase prAyeRa
'SayAnasya hi te BUmO kasmAnnodvijate vapuH' (hari0 23135) BayAnna vepata iti vivakzati
'na prahfzyetpriyaM prApya nodvijet prApya cApriyam' (gItA0 520) udvijet=udvijeta=glAyet vimanAyeta
'saMmAnAd brAhmaRo nityamudvijeta vizAdiva' (manu0 2162) udvijeta trasyet biBIyAt
'kaccinnogreRa daRqena BfSamudvijase prajAH' (BA0 saBA0 544) udvijase udvejayasi trAsayasi BAyayasi antarBAvitaRyarTakotra vijiH prAyeRAkftakftyatvAnmftyorudvijate janaH viBetItyarTaH
'udvejayati BUtAni krUravAg Danadopi san' (kA0 nI0 sA0 323) vitrAsayati uttrAsayati udvejayati sUkzmopi caraRaM kaRwakANkuraH vyaTayatItyarTaH
'udvajayati jihvAgraM kurvaScimacimAM kawuH' (bAgBawa0 105) suSrute (22214) nazwasaMjYasya (jalaprokzaRena) saMjYApratilamBane'rTe udvijeH prayogo Ryantasya
'nodvignaScarate DarmaM nodvignaScarate kriyAm' (BA0 Adi0 4128) udvigno'SAntaH asvasTacittaH
'nAyamudvijituM kAlaH svAmikAryAd BavAdfSAm' (Bawwi0 792) udvijituM vicalitum AtmAnaM parihartum
